summary: Current S001 task-pull API/CLI/docs/.agent-board diff passed focused API task-pull Jest, API type-check/build, focused CLI task-pull Jest, CLI type-check/build, Prettier, diff check, conflict scan, S002-scoped trailing-whitespace scan, board JSON/JSONL checks, and production line-count checks.
notes: The first CLI Jest command failed because --testMatch was passed with repository-root-expanded paths while Jest ran with packages/cli as root; the corrected package-root pattern passed.
A broad trailing-whitespace scan found unrelated baseline whitespace in non-task-pull CLI files; the S002-scoped task-pull/docs/.agent-board scan passed.
The initial Prettier check found .agent-board/board.md formatting drift; it was formatted and the rerun passed.
